violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation system has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Raw animal foods (such as bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as bread) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Deli meats and chicken salad were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
